evals.expected_output: Fetches with prune, identifies [gone] branches, removes them with worktrees if present
assertions: git fetch --prune is run before inspecting branches
git branch -v (or git branch -vv) is used to identify [gone] branches
The current branch is not deleted
main and master branches are not deleted
When no [gone] branches exist, user is told there is nothing to clean up
Each deleted branch is reported to the user

evals.prompt: I've merged a bunch of PRs and now I have loads of dead branches locally, can you tidy them up?
evals.expected_output: Runs git fetch --prune, finds [gone] branches, deletes them, reports what was removed
assertions: git fetch --prune is run before inspecting branches
git branch -v (or git branch -vv) is used to identify [gone] branches
The current branch is not deleted
main and master branches are not deleted
When no [gone] branches exist, user is told there is nothing to clean up
Each deleted branch is reported to the user

evals.expected_output: Identifies and removes all [gone] branches including worktree cleanup
assertions: git fetch --prune is run before inspecting branches
git branch -v (or git branch -vv) is used to identify [gone] branches
The current branch is not deleted
main and master branches are not deleted
When no [gone] branches exist, user is told there is nothing to clean up
Each deleted branch is reported to the user
